name: Deploy ComfyUI as serverless API
description: User wants to deploy ComfyUI as a serverless endpoint for image generation.
user_intent: I want to deploy ComfyUI as a serverless API endpoint for image generation. Use a 24GB VRAM GPU. Name it rpcli-eval-comfyui. Use the image timpietruskyblibla/runpod-worker-comfy:3.0.0. After creating the endpoint, verify it exists by listing endpoints.
expected_outcome: Agent creates an endpoint with the correct image and a 24GB GPU type, then verifies it was created by listing endpoints.
